# currentDate
Today's date is 2026-03-19.

# Genome Analysis Project

## Sample

- **Sample ID:** GFXC087577
- **Source:** Dante Labs whole genome sequencing
- **Original build:** GRCh37/hg19 (Dante Labs callset)
- **Target build:** GRCh38 (DeepVariant re-analysis)
- **Total variants:** ~5.2M (GRCh37), ~4.5-5.5M expected (GRCh38)

## Re-Analysis Pipeline

6-phase pipeline: HPC setup -> FASTQ staging -> nf-core/raredisease -> artifact triage -> IGV validation -> clinical report.

**Status:** Phases 1-3 complete. Pipeline completed successfully 14-Mar-2026 01:22 (1d 13h 10m, 62 processes, 316.4 CPU hours). Results at `/rds/general/user/nskene/home/GenomeAnalysis/results/` on CX3.

**VEP annotation:** Standalone VEP with 5 plugins (CADD, LOFTEE, SpliceAI, AlphaMissense, REVEL) run separately from pipeline. Initial whole-genome job killed at 8h walltime (only chr1-6 annotated, 2,134,432 records). Now uses per-chromosome parallelization: 24 PBS jobs × 4h walltime each. Run `run_vep_parallel.sh` to submit, `merge_vep.sh` to combine. Phases 4-6 (triage, validation, report) scripts ready, not yet run against raredisease output.

## Files

### GRCh37 (Original)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `genome.vcf.gz` | Original VCF from Dante Labs (no rsIDs) |
| `genome.vcf.gz.tbi` | Tabix index for original VCF |
| `genome.rsid.vcf.gz` | rsID-annotated VCF (current primary) |
| `genome.rsid.vcf.gz.tbi` | Tabix index for annotated VCF |
| `00-All.vcf.gz` | dbSNP b151 full reference (~15GB) |
| `00-All.vcf.gz.tbi` | dbSNP tabix index |

### GRCh38 (Re-analysis)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `grch38/genome.grch38.vcf.gz` | DeepVariant VCF (from nf-core pipeline) |
| `grch38/genome.grch38.vep.vcf.gz` | VEP-annotated VCF (standalone VEP with CADD+LOFTEE+SpliceAI+AlphaMissense+REVEL) |

### Polygenic Risk Scores

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `prs_results.json` | Pre-computed PRS results (generated by process_prs_results.py) |
| `pgs_population_stats.json` | Cached scoring file stats for z-score computation |
| `process_prs_results.py` | Parse pgsc_calc output + enrich with trait metadata + z-scores |
| `hpc/pgscalc.config` | Nextflow config: PBS Pro executor + memory escalation for pgsc_calc |
| `hpc/run_pgscalc_all.sh` | Single pgsc_calc invocation (Nextflow handles job scheduling) |
| `hpc/prep_prs_inputs.sh` | Create autosomal VCF + extract remaining IDs + validate samplesheet |
| `hpc/prs_batch.sh` | Status/concat utilities (batch submission DEPRECATED) |
| `hpc/run_pgscalc.sh` | Legacy single-batch launcher (kept for reference) |
| `hpc/prs_samplesheet.csv` | pgsc_calc v2.2.0 samplesheet (path_prefix format) |
| `hpc/download_pgs_ids.py` | Fetch all PGS IDs from PGS Catalog API |

### HPC Pipeline

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `hpc/nextflow.config` | Imperial HPC PBS Pro + Apptainer config |
| `hpc/samplesheet.csv` | nf-core/raredisease singleton input |
| `hpc/setup_hpc.sh` | One-time HPC environment setup |
| `hpc/download_fastq.sh` | BAM/FASTQ download from Dante Labs |
| `hpc/bam2fastq.sh` | PBS job: BAM to paired FASTQ extraction |
| `hpc/stage_references.sh` | Reference genome + annotation staging |
| `hpc/run_pipeline.sh` | nf-core/raredisease launch script |
| `hpc/run_vep.sh` | VEP annotation (whole-genome or per-chromosome via CHR var) |
| `hpc/run_vep_parallel.sh` | Submit 24 per-chromosome VEP jobs in parallel |
| `hpc/merge_vep.sh` | Merge per-chr VEP results + verify variant counts |
| `hpc/monitor.sh` | Job monitoring helper |

## Quick Commands

```bash
# Look up variant by rsID (works with both GRCh37 and GRCh38 VCFs)
bcftools query -i 'ID="rs1805007"' -f '%CHROM\t%POS\t%ID\t%REF\t%ALT\t[%GT]\n' genome.rsid.vcf.gz

# Extract gene region (e.g., MC1R on chr16)
bcftools view genome.rsid.vcf.gz 16:89985000-89987000

# Run triage on annotated VCF
bash triage/run_triage.sh grch38/genome.grch38.vep.vcf.gz

# Generate clinical report
python3 report/generate_report.py --triage-dir triage/output --output report/
```

## PRS Workflow

### Architecture

pgsc_calc runs as a single Nextflow invocation. Nextflow submits individual tasks as PBS jobs
with automatic memory escalation and retry on OOM. No bash batching needed.

Key config: `hpc/pgscalc.config` — PBS Pro executor, FORMAT_SCOREFILES gets 8→24→72→216 GB retry.

### Running (on HPC)

```bash
# Step 1: Prepare inputs (autosomal VCF + remaining IDs + validate samplesheet)
bash scripts/prep_prs_inputs.sh

# Step 2: Launch pgsc_calc (Nextflow head process on login node)
nohup bash scripts/run_pgscalc_all.sh --ids scripts/remaining_prs_ids.txt \
    > results/prs/prs_run.log 2>&1 &

# Step 3: Monitor
bash scripts/prs_batch.sh --status    # Overall status
bash scripts/prs_batch.sh --trace     # Live Nextflow trace

# Step 4: Resume after failure
bash scripts/run_pgscalc_all.sh --ids scripts/remaining_prs_ids.txt --resume

# Step 5: Concatenate all results (old batches + new run)
bash scripts/prs_batch.sh --concat
```

### Post-processing (local)

```bash
scp imperial:~/GenomeAnalysis/results/prs/all_scores.txt.gz results/
python3 process_prs_results.py results/all_scores.txt.gz --metadata pgs_metadata.json --output prs_results.json
```

### Status

- **Completed:** 121 scores from batches 000-004 (2500 PGS IDs)
- **Remaining:** ~2796 PGS IDs (batches 005-010 failed with OOM at 128GB)
- **Fix:** New architecture uses Nextflow PBS executor with memory escalation (no bash batching)
- **Samplesheet:** Updated to v2.2.0 format (path_prefix, autosomal VCF)
- **Z-scores:** Theoretical (AF-based), proper ancestry adjustment via `--run_ancestry` planned

## Python Usage

```python
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "/Users/nathanskene/.claude/skills/genome")
from genome_query import (
    get_variant_by_rsid,    # Local VCF query
    get_variant_by_pos,     # Local VCF query
    get_region,             # Local VCF query
    get_gene_variants,      # Ensembl REST + local VCF
    annotate_variant,       # MyVariant.info API (external)
    extract_panel,          # Local VCF query
    scan_clinvar,           # MyVariant.info API (external)
    scan_lof,               # MyVariant.info API (external)
    get_gene_impact,        # Ensembl REST + MyVariant.info API (external)
    get_build_info,         # Build detection (GRCh37/GRCh38)
)
```

`genome_query.py` auto-detects GRCh38 VCF (priority) or falls back to GRCh37.

## Skill

Use `/genome` skill for interactive queries. See `~/.claude/skills/genome/SKILL.md`.

## Imperial HPC

- **Cluster:** CX3 (`login.cx3.hpc.ic.ac.uk`, user nskene)
- **Login node:** `login-bi` (lightweight — needs manual Lmod init)
- **Scheduler:** PBS Pro 2024.1.1 (qsub/qstat, NOT SLURM)
- **Container:** Apptainer 1.4.5 (singularity CLI compatible)
- **Modules:** Lmod 8.7.55 — init with `source /usr/share/lmod/lmod/init/bash`
- **Key modules:** Java/17, Nextflow/25.10.2, SAMtools/1.21, BCFtools/1.21
- **Requires:** Imperial VPN (Zscaler) for DNS resolution
- **Home storage:** `/rds/general/user/nskene/home/GenomeAnalysis/` (data, FASTQs, references, results)
- **Ephemeral:** `/rds/general/user/nskene/ephemeral/` (Nextflow work dir, container cache)
- **SSH:** ControlMaster enabled (8h persist)

## API References

- **MyVariant.info:** https://myvariant.info/ (variant annotation)
- **Ensembl REST:** https://rest.ensembl.org/ (GRCh38) / https://grch37.rest.ensembl.org/ (GRCh37)
- **GWAS Catalog:** https://www.ebi.ac.uk/gwas/
- **biothings-client docs:** https://docs.myvariant.info/en/latest/doc/packages.html

## Privacy

Functions that make **external API calls** (send rsIDs to MyVariant.info):
- `annotate_variant()`, `annotate_variants_batch()`, `scan_clinvar()`, `scan_lof()`, `get_gene_impact()`

Functions that are **local-only** (no external calls):
- `get_variant_by_rsid()`, `get_variant_by_pos()`, `get_region()`, `get_gene_variants()` (Ensembl for coords only), `extract_panel()`

No personal identifiers are sent — only variant IDs (rsIDs or HGVS notation).
